title: The Tug-of-War Game
body: Four dogs play tug-of-war. Astro $$(A=160.0$$ N) pulls 55° south of east $$((\theta)A=-55\degree)$$, Balto $$(B=200.0$$ N) pulls 60° east of north $$((\theta)B=30\degree)$$, and Clifford $$(C=140.0$$ N) pulls 55° west of north $$((\theta)C=145\degree)$$. Dug pulls so the toy does not move - his force must exactly cancel the resultant of the other three. Find the magnitude and direction of Dug's force.
